raw_consumer_statement: Citi bank with out my authorization enrolled my account in XXXX credit card protection program. Once I realized this I terminated the program and requested a refund for the total amount charged to my account based on the 2015 settlement Citi was ordered to pay. Citi bank only refunded me for XXXX month. I have filed a claim with the better business bureau and have heard nothing from Citi and still have not been refunded for the monthly charges that Citi charged to my account.
